title: Job Posting
description: Represents a job posting within the Workday Recruiting system, including the position details, requirements, and posting status.

id.description: The unique Workday identifier for the job posting

descriptor.description: The display name of the job posting

title.description: The title of the job posting

postingDate.description: The date the job was posted

status.description: The current status of the job posting

jobProfile.description: The job profile for this posting

hiringManager.description: The hiring manager for this position

isInternal.description: Whether this is an internal-only posting
